checks.details: Stable transcripts must not expose internal micro-tags or control tags.
Stable transcript files must exist for every expected side/stage and carry matching metadata.
Transcript artifacts must include visible CTA/input state metadata or an explicit captured-state note.
Fresh invitee Stage 0 transcripts must preserve the visible topic/process handoff card shown before the invitee opener.
Stable transcript separator blocks must carry explicit labels so private suggestions and shared events are not confused.
A transcript must not label the current user's own share suggestion as incoming partner-shared context.
Stable transcripts must not expose internal reconciler analysis, alignment scores, or action labels.
First slice checks explicit leak markers; richer structured leakage checks need DB event metadata.
Every scenario side must reach the requested stage limit, a completed state, or a no-action partner wait at the requested stop stage.
Actor status blocks must match the side assigned by the orchestrator.
Fresh gold-loop sessions should start with the participant identified by the gold profile's Stage 0 initiation evidence.
A live Stage 1 felt-heard gate should not appear before any substantive transcript context.
Stable Stage 1 transcripts must make the user's explicit feel-heard confirmation auditable.
If visible copy invites the user to keep talking, transcript state must show a visible/enabled textbox.
